ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "overall_quality" INTEGER /* Overall quality rating of the property */,
  "total_bsmt_sf" INTEGER /* Total square feet of basement space */,
  "gr_liv_area" INTEGER /* Above ground living area in square feet */,
  "full_bath" INTEGER /* Number of full bathrooms */,
  "kitchen_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the kitchen (e.g., excellent, good, fair, poor) */,
  "garage_cars" INTEGER /* Number of garage cars */,
  "antiquity" INTEGER /* Age of the property in years */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "roof_material" TEXT /* Material used for the roof */,
  "exterior_finish" TEXT /* Exterior finish of the property */,
  "fireplace_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the fireplace (if present) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property sold */,
  "sale_price" INTEGER /* Sale price of the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the property was sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real estate agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the buyer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Full name of the seller */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the property */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the property is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_rates" (
  "crime_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime rate entry */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" TEXT /* Crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime (e.g., theft, assault) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_rates_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_districts" (
  "school_district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school district */,
  "school_district_name" TEXT /* Name of the school district */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the school district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_transportation" (
  "transportation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public transportation entry */,
  "transportation_type" TEXT /* Type of public transportation (e.g., bus, train) */,
  "distance_to_property" TEXT /* Distance from the property to the public transportation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transportation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "property_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property-feature association */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_features_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_agents" (
  "property_agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property-agent association */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_agents_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_agents_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_buyers" (
  "property_buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property-buyer association */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the buyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_buyers_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_buyers_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_sellers" (
  "property_seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property-seller association */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_seller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_sellers_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_sellers_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_locations" (
  "property_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property-location association */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_locations_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_locations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property-type association */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_types_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views for the property */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the view was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the reviewer */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text review left by the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_reviews_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents_specialties" (
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialty entry */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent */,
  "specialty_name" TEXT /* Name of the specialty (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_specialties_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)
